item.title: Timeout constants in build/launcher/ not in config/defaults.ts
item.intent: All build/launcher/ timeout and interval constants have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No local timeout literals remain except in firewall.ts (deferred to BUG-020/post-CQ-005).
item.description: src/build/launcher/ has 5 local timeout constants not centralized in config/defaults.ts, following the same pattern as BUG-038 (gateway/) and BUG-039 (operate/). Locations: src/build/launcher/health.ts:18 (DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS=60_000), src/build/launcher/health.ts:19 (DEFAULT_INTERVAL_MS=2_000), src/build/launcher/health.ts:20 (MAX_INTERVAL_MS=10_000), src/build/launcher/health.ts:21 (RPC_TIMEOUT_MS=5_000), src/build/launcher/health.ts:22 (SMOKE_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_MS=30_000), src/build/launcher/preflight.ts:23 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=15_000). Note: src/build/launcher/firewall.ts:25 (EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=15_000) will move to src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts when CQ-005 completes — do NOT touch firewall.ts here, that's covered by BUG-020. Steps: (1) add DEPLOY_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS=60_000, DEPLOY_HEALTH_INTERVAL_MS=2_000, DEPLOY_HEALTH_MAX_INTERVAL_MS=10_000, DEPLOY_RPC_TIMEOUT_MS=5_000, DEPLOY_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_MS=30_000, PREFLIGHT_EXEC_TIMEOUT_MS=15_000 to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace in health.ts and preflight.ts; (3) run build/ tests. Scope: 3 files, no logic change. Do NOT touch firewall.ts.
